NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

A MANDARIN SPEAKING INTERPRETER SHALL BE PROVIDED TO PLAINTIFF TO ASSIST HER AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
